_meta.source: Manual identity split after Yao Shunyu name collision review
_meta.note: Separate Vinces/Shunyu Yao (AI agents, OpenAI -> Tencent) from Shunyu Yao (physics -> Anthropic/DeepMind).

people.name: 姚顺雨
people.currentTitle: Chief AI Scientist, CEO/President's Office / Head of AI Infra & LLM @ Tencent
people.description: AI agent researcher; known for ReAct, Tree of Thoughts, SWE-agent, and OpenAI agent work; later appointed Tencent Chief AI Scientist.
people.whyImportant: 姚顺雨是语言智能体研究的重要人物，参与 ReAct、Tree of Thoughts、SWE-agent、Computer-Using Agent 等工作。2025 年 12 月多家媒体报道其出任腾讯 CEO/总裁办公室首席 AI 科学家，并兼任 AI Infra 与大语言模型相关负责人。

products.name: ReAct
products.description: Reasoning-and-acting framework that became one of the foundations for language-model agents.

products.name: Tree of Thoughts
products.description: Deliberate search-style reasoning method for large language models.

products.name: Computer-Using Agent
products.description: OpenAI agent system for operating digital interfaces.

products.name: Deep Research
products.description: Agentic research product for navigating and reasoning over web information.

products.name: SWE-agent
products.description: Agent-computer interface framework for software engineering language models.

products.name: SWE-bench
products.description: Benchmark for evaluating whether language models can resolve real GitHub issues.

roles.roleZh: 计算机科学实验班（姚班）本科生

sources.title: About - Shunyu Yao - 姚顺雨
sources.text: Personal website states: I am a researcher at OpenAI. I study agents. Selected work includes Computer-Using Agent, Deep Research, tau-bench, Language Agents dissertation, and SWE-agent.
sources.reason: Official personal website establishes the AI agent identity and selected works.

sources.title: 27岁姚顺雨出任腾讯首席AI科学家
sources.text: ScienceNet/China Science Daily reports that Tencent upgraded its large-model R&D structure and that former OpenAI researcher 姚顺雨 became Chief AI Scientist in the CEO/President's Office, also responsible for AI Infra and large-language-model work.
sources.reason: Authority media report for the Tencent current role.

cards.title: 从 OpenAI Agent 到腾讯 AI Infra
cards.content: 姚顺雨以语言智能体研究闻名，个人页列出的代表工作包括 Computer-Using Agent、Deep Research、SWE-agent 与语言智能体博士论文。2025 年 12 月，腾讯大模型研发体系调整后，多家媒体报道他出任 CEO/总裁办公室首席 AI 科学家，并兼任 AI Infra 与大语言模型相关负责人。

people.name: 姚顺宇
people.currentTitle: Senior Staff Research Scientist @ Google DeepMind
people.description: Theoretical physicist turned AI researcher; worked on Claude agentic coding and large-scale reinforcement learning after a Stanford physics PhD.
people.whyImportant: 姚顺宇是从理论物理转向前沿 AI 的研究者。个人页显示他本科在清华高等研究院，斯坦福理论物理博士，曾在 Anthropic 做 Research Scientist，参与 Claude 3.7 agentic coding 与 Claude 4 系列强化学习相关工作，现为 Google DeepMind Senior Staff Research Scientist。

officialLinks.title: X
officialLinks.bio: AI research@DeepMind Prev: @AnthropicAI UG@Tsinghua_Uni, PhD @Stanford and Postdoc @Berkeley

products.name: Claude 3.7 agentic coding
products.description: Personal website credits his Anthropic work with Claude 3.7 agentic coding and tool-use capabilities.

products.name: Claude 4 family RL numerics
products.description: Personal website describes work on reinforcement-learning numerics and algorithm design for the Claude 4 family.

roles.roleZh: 清华高等研究院本科生
高级 Staff 研究科学家

sources.title: Dr. Shunyu Yao | Physicist & AI Researcher
sources.text: Personal website states that Shunyu Yao is currently a Senior Staff Research Scientist at Google DeepMind, previously a Research Scientist at Anthropic, completed a Stanford theoretical physics PhD, and studied at Tsinghua University IAS.
sources.reason: Official personal website establishes the physics-to-AI identity, current role, and career trajectory.

sources.title: Shunyu Yao - INSPIRE HEP
sources.text: INSPIRE HEP profile identifies Shunyu Yao (姚顺宇), Anthropic, with research areas including condensed matter, high-energy theory, and general relativity.
sources.reason: Academic profile disambiguates the Chinese name and physics background.

sources.title: Shunyu Yao (@ShunyuYao14)
sources.text: X profile bio: AI research@DeepMind Prev: @AnthropicAI UG@Tsinghua_Uni, PhD @Stanford and Postdoc @Berkeley.
sources.reason: Current social profile cross-checks DeepMind, Anthropic, Tsinghua, Stanford, and Berkeley identity markers.

cards.title: 物理背景转向 AI：从清华、斯坦福到 DeepMind
cards.content: 姚顺宇的公开个人页显示，他本科在清华高等研究院，随后在斯坦福理论物理方向完成博士，并在伯克利短暂做博士后。转向 AI 后，他先在 Anthropic 做 Research Scientist，现为 Google DeepMind Senior Staff Research Scientist。

cards.title: Claude 强化学习与 agentic coding 贡献
cards.content: 个人页把姚顺宇在 Anthropic 的工作归纳为大规模强化学习、agentic coding、工具使用、RL 数值稳定性与算法设计，并明确提到这些工作与 Claude 3.7 和 Claude 4 系列相关。

cards.title: 非厄米皮肤效应与量子混沌背景
cards.content: 在转向 AI 前，姚顺宇的研究集中在理论物理，包括非厄米皮肤效应、Scramblon Theory、量子黑洞与全息理论。这也是他和语言智能体研究者姚顺雨最容易被同名混淆的身份差异。

archiveCardsFrom.reason: These cards belong to the physics/Anthropic/DeepMind Shunyu Yao, not the AI-agent/OpenAI/Tencent Vinces Yao.

deleteRawSources.reason: Official page for 姚顺宇 / Alfred Yao (physics, Anthropic, DeepMind), incorrectly attached to 姚顺雨 / Vinces Yao (agents, OpenAI, Tencent).
